context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct callback signatures for different control types (button: 1 arg; toggleButton: 2 args; dropDown: 3 args), stores the IRibbonUI object from onLoad, and calls Invalidate/InvalidateControl to refresh controls.

checklist.name: button onAction signature
checklist.description: The Refresh Now button's onAction callback function has exactly 1 parameter (the control)

checklist.name: toggleButton onAction signature
checklist.description: The toggle button's onAction callback function has exactly 2 parameters (the control and a boolean pressed state)

checklist.name: dropDown onAction signature
checklist.description: The data provider dropdown's onAction callback function has exactly 3 parameters (the control, selectedId string, and selectedIndex integer)

checklist.name: IRibbonUI stored from onLoad
checklist.description: The onLoad callback on the customUI element stores the received IRibbonUI argument in a module-level variable (so it can be used by other functions)

checklist.name: Invalidate called after provider change
checklist.description: The dropdown's onAction callback (or a function it calls) invokes Invalidate() or InvalidateControl() on the stored IRibbonUI object

checklist.name: module.function callbacks
checklist.description: All callback attribute values in portfolio_ribbon.xml use module.function format (contain a dot with portfolio_ribbon as the module name)
